title: QA: BACKGROUND_SHELLS is process-global LazyLock singleton
description:
## Severity
Minor
## Dimension
decoupling
## Location
src/tools/bash/mod.rs:271-272
## Violation
`BACKGROUND_SHELLS` is a process-wide `LazyLock<BackgroundShellManager>`. Tests share state, multi-tenant deployments cannot isolate per-session shells, bash cannot be unit-tested without real processes. DIP violation.

Quoted (mod.rs:270-272):
```
pub static BACKGROUND_SHELLS: std::sync::LazyLock<BackgroundShellManager> =
    std::sync::LazyLock::new(BackgroundShellManager::new);
```

Tests admit the problem at mod.rs:479-482.
## Mandated refactor
1. Introduce `pub trait ShellManager: Send + Sync`.
2. Plumb `Arc<dyn ShellManager>` through tool dispatch.
3. Eliminate `pub static`.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
